underlying_goal: Implement a chat UI where welcome/tag buttons are pinned at the top of the scroll view after receiving a server response, while maintaining proper scroll behavior (last message visible on open, last user message at top after response)
friction_detail: Claude initially misunderstood the pinned welcome requirement (making it part of entries instead of outside the feed), then forgot to add the welcome message back on open, requiring user corrections and reverts.
brief_summary: User wanted to implement pinned tag buttons at top of scrollable chat view with proper scroll behavior; achieved after multiple rounds of corrections due to initial misunderstanding of the layout requirement.
